title: Validate on standards-compliance: onboard + sample change-set review
Baseline-aware PR review step (certifier + reuse + judge)
close_reason: PR reviewer (net-new gating + reuse advisories), git adapter, review CLI, 6 tests; 78/78 green

title: Neutral deterministic write-time detectors (Kotlin/Java/TS/Python)
Codebase pattern model + onboarding skill (project map, canonical refs, consistency)
close_reason: Codebase evidence map + onboarding implemented (model/, onboard CLI, skill, design 14, tests)

title: Validate engine via e2e todo-app build + refactor-prevention tests
close_reason: e2e suite added in integration/test/e2e-todo.test.ts: conformant scaffold passes, deviations caught at write-time, refactor clears finding, banned-construct + missed-reuse surfaced, PR gate blocks. All 22 tests green.

title: Integration: GitHub Copilot CLI (hooks, skills, MCP)
description: Build the primary integration: Copilot CLI write-time hook config, a conformance skill, and an MCP server exposing selection+conformance tools. Wire to the conformance engine contract.
close_reason: Copilot CLI integration MVP built: engine, detectors, copilot adapter, CLI, MCP server, hooks/skill/plugin/workflow, e2e tests (22 passing).

title: Rubber-duck whole concept + design/architecture
description: Run two parallel rubber-duck critiques: (1) the overall project concept/value, (2) the expanded design/architecture. Incorporate feedback into the docs before building.
close_reason: Two parallel rubber-duck reviews (concept + architecture, gpt-5.5) completed and incorporated into design/validator (new doc 13 + edits to 02/09/11/12, README precedence note). Key adopted changes: two-tier enforceable-vs-advisory model; write-time advisory+fail-open (was fail-closed blocking); PR CI authoritative gate; LLM advisory-only+evidence-gated+abstain in v1; enforcement orchestrates existing tools (ESLint/dep-cruiser/Semgrep/ArchUnit) not reimplements; semantic-fingerprint finding identity + expiring waivers; detector variants; warn-not-block profile coherence; init=candidate-report; MVP vertical slice (TS + Copilot CLI postToolUse + PR Action, 10-20 rulepacks, LLM advisory) with trust metrics gating expansion.

title: Expand conformance architecture: philosophy-first selection + practice patterns
description: Update design/validator docs so a project selects PHILOSOPHIES first (which imply adopted/banned patterns + provide the LLM north-star), incorporate product/UX practice patterns, and add the selection/bootstrap mechanism. Keep three-phase engine.
close_reason: Architecture expanded: 09-config philosophy-first, 11-philosophy-selection, 12-integration-contract, 13-mvp-and-trust. Implemented + validated by the integration MVP.

title: Cross-source graphs, mappings & connections
description: Build/generate richer connection artefacts: philosophy->pattern->practice-pattern graph, project-archetype presets (philosophy+pattern bundles), reverse indexes, and a combined knowledge graph. Add any missing cross-links across software patterns, practice patterns, and philosophies.
close_reason: Cross-source knowledge-graph generator built (tools/src/generate-graph.ts): emits docs/graph/knowledge-graph.json + index.md with 459 nodes / 2502 edges across patterns, practice patterns, philosophies. Wired into build.

title: Research: conformance tooling & agent integration surfaces
description: Research architecture fitness functions (ArchUnit, dependency-cruiser, ESLint boundaries, Semgrep, Danger, OpenRewrite, Sonar), evolutionary-architecture fitness functions, and agent integration surfaces: GitHub Copilot CLI hooks/skills/MCP/extensions, opencode/claude-code/codex hook models, and GitHub agentic workflows (gh-aw)/Copilot coding agent. Feed findings into design.
close_reason: Two research reports delivered + saved to session files: (1) conformance/fitness-function tooling state-of-the-art (ArchUnit/ts-arch/dependency-cruiser/eslint-boundaries/Nx/Semgrep/OpenRewrite/LLM-as-judge + philosophy->enforceable-bundle mapping pipeline); (2) agent integration surfaces (Copilot CLI/cloud, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode hooks/skills/MCP/plugins + canonical event map). Key correction: Copilot CLI DOES support feedback injection (postToolUse.additionalContext), arg rewrite (preToolUse.modifiedArgs), loop continuation (agentStop block+reason), toolName matchers — verified against docs.github.com hooks-reference.

title: EPIC: Philosophy-driven pattern governance + multi-runtime agent integration
description: Ultimate goal: guide agents to a selected set of design philosophies + patterns for a project, then strictly align all work to them so the codebase scales. Covers: cross-source graphs/mappings, expanded conformance architecture (philosophy-first selection + practice patterns), rubber-duck review, and a built-out integration layer for agentic work patterns (GitHub Copilot CLI hooks/skills/MCP first; expandable to opencode/claude-code/codex; remote GitHub agentic workflows).
close_reason: Epic complete: 275 patterns + 145 PM/UX practice patterns + 40 philosophies + cross-source graph; philosophy-first validator design (docs 01-13); runnable conformance MVP (engine, Copilot CLI binding, MCP, PR gate); multi-runtime adapters (claude/codex/opencode); remote cloud-agent provisioning. 28 integration tests green.

title: Philosophies: 16 distinct design philosophies with pattern associations + applied evidence
description: Add philosophies/ subsystem: schema+tooling, 16 distinct philosophies (incl. Ousterhout APoSD), each associating catalogue patterns and tagging where reportedly applied with evidence_strength.
close_reason: 16 distinct philosophies authored (incl. Ousterhout APoSD), each with pattern associations and evidence-tagged applications; tooling + reverse index; all valid under npm run build

title: Validator: 3-phase pattern-conformance design (do-it-later/write/pr)
close_reason: Validator design docs 00-10 complete: concepts, architecture, 3 phases, routing, reuse, types, config, rollout

title: Catalogue: author 200+ patterns to schema across categories
close_reason: 275 patterns authored (target 200+), all valid under --strict, zero dangling cross-refs

title: Catalogue: schema, vocab, tooling (validator + doc generator)
close_reason: schema, vocab, validator, doc generator, stats all working

title: Phase 5: certified blocking + eval harness
description: Evidence contract for blockable findings (policyId+predicate+exact evidence+severity). Promotion path: advisory->blocking only with deterministic corroboration or human ratification + replay stability. Eval harness: held-out calibration/regression/adversarial/cross-language sets; metrics precision/recall/false-block/abstention/cost/latency/disagreement.
close_reason: Phase 5 shipped: evidence contract + deterministic certifier (policy/) — Policy with machine-verifiable predicates (forbidden-layer-edge/forbidden-import/no-duplicate-symbol) is the ONLY source of block-severity findings, re-derived deterministically with exact evidence; corroborate() links advisory LLM findings to certified blocks for the same file (LLM never upgrades itself). Eval harness (eval/) measures judge advisory precision/recall by held-out set AND certifier false-block rate with a promotable gate (zero conforming cases blocked). 63/63 tests green.

title: Phase 4: LLM advisory detection layer
description: LLMClient + ModelRouter (pattern-scale x phase -> tier) + catalogue-grounded judge (per-pattern description + pos/neg examples). Structured output {verdict,confidence,evidenceSpans,rationale,fix}. Validation: span-exists/text-match/policy-allowed; reject out-of-region citations; second entailment verifier. Prompt-injection hardening + tests. Hard budgets + graceful degradation. Audit record per finding. Fake client for tests. Advisory only.
close_reason: Phase 4 LLM advisory layer shipped: provider-agnostic LLMClient + fake/offline clients; ModelRouter + hard Budget; catalogue-grounded judge (rich YAML examples as grounding); strict structured-output validation; injection hardening (content-derived fence, code-as-data, span-in-region checks, relabel guard); fail-open on errors/timeouts; replay cache; full audit records. Advisory-only enforced at the Finding level so CI gates can never block on LLM findings. 55/55 tests green (incl 27 judge tests). Rubber-duck pass incorporated.

title: Phase 3: Kotlin demonstrable win (tree-sitter L1)
description: DEFERRED (not abandoned). Tree-sitter L1 Kotlin provider for higher-fidelity deterministic symbols. Deprioritised per user direction: regex/AST is 'supporting and the speed benefit rather than the core mechanism'; LLM is the language-independent core. L0 universal provider (Phase 2) already unlocked all languages with a working Kotlin map (530 files/1265 edges on standards-compliance). Pick up before enabling LIVE deterministic blocking on JVM repos, where richer symbols improve certifier evidence quality. Needs native tree-sitter + tree-sitter-kotlin bindings.

title: Phase 2: L0 universal provider (all languages)
description: Path/layer conventions + line-level import-ish + signature extraction that works for ANY language. Per-build-system layer presets (gradle/maven/go.mod/pyproject) + auto-detect. Low-confidence facts never block. Multi-language onboarding works.
close_reason: L0 universal provider shipped: regex-line extraction for kotlin/java/scala/python/go/csharp/rust/ruby/php/swift; broad walker (walkAllFiles); orchestrator FQN/symbol index resolves package-qualified imports to files. standards-compliance Kotlin repo now scans 530 files / 1265 edges (was 4 empty). 34/34 tests green.

title: Phase 1: LanguageProvider seam + neutral code model
description: Introduce LanguageProvider interface + neutral FileFacts/ModuleId model with provenance (tier/confidence/span/extractionMethod/version). Refactor TS extraction behind a TypeScriptProvider; ProviderRegistry picks providers by file; de-lock walkSourceFiles. Evidence map + detectors consume the neutral model. Keep all existing tests green.
close_reason: LanguageProvider seam + neutral model shipped; TS provider; 33/33 green

title: Language-neutral, LLM-first conformance detection
description: Re-architect detection so patterns/architectures are language-independent: a LanguageProvider seam producing a neutral code model (tiers L0 regex/path -> L1 tree-sitter -> L2 native -> L3 SCIP index), and an LLM-first detection brain (catalogue-grounded judge across all 275 patterns + model routing by pattern-scale/phase) where deterministic checks are the accelerator + the only merge-blocking verifier. Rubber-duck adopted (2026-06-03): LLM-only never auto-blocks; blocking requires machine-verifiable predicate or human ratification; hard cost budgets; route against project-selected patterns; provenance on every fact; held-out eval sets; prompt-injection as security; full audit per finding.

title: Integration: remote agent environments (GitHub agentic workflows)
description: Build the PR-level + remote integration: GitHub Actions / agentic workflow (gh-aw) that runs conformance on PRs and for the Copilot coding agent; expandable to other remote runners.
close_reason: Remote wiring delivered: copilot-setup-steps.yml provisions the cloud agent (binary on PATH + CONFORMANCE_CATALOGUE_ROOT); PR Action is the authoritative gate for agent PRs; REMOTE.md documents gh-aw/CI + MCP wiring.

title: Integration: multi-runtime adapter abstraction
description: Define a runtime-agnostic integration contract and adapters so the system also targets opencode, Claude Code, and Codex (hooks/plugins/MCP), not just Copilot CLI.
close_reason: Multi-runtime adapter abstraction built: neutral core (normalize→evaluatePhase→project) + copilot/claude/codex/generic dialects, --runtime CLI flag, Claude settings template, OpenCode MCP path documented. 6 runtime tests passing.

title: Product & UX practice patterns + philosophies subsystem
description: Extend the catalogue to product management and UX design: unified practice-pattern schema (product/ux), cross-domain philosophy support, validation + doc tooling, exemplars, and bulk-authored patterns/philosophies with cross-references into the software catalogue. Target curated depth (~50-70 PM, ~60-70 UX patterns; ~12 PM + ~12 UX philosophies).
close_reason: Practice subsystem complete: 145 PM/UX patterns + 22 philosophies authored, validated, docs+graph generated, committed and pushed.

title: Catalogue: generate docs + index
close_reason: Generated docs + index for all 275 patterns
